chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1227 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor intimation is received. After filing of instant petition in the year 2021, it was fixed once on 29.07.2021 when subject to maintainability notices were ordered to be issued against respondents and A.A.G. Sindh. Since then, no efforts have been taken to fix the matter in Court for proceedings. This shows lack of interest on the part of the petitioner. Resultantly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
